response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust expertise in production routing or navigation systems, and his recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js — raising concerns about his current proficiency in the required low-level systems programming and geospatial data pipelines.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO use
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse stacks and pick appropriate tools
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and systems-level problem solving
concerns: No visible commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or geospatial tiling
Recent roles focus on web/TypeScript stacks, not low-latency systems or distributed data pipelines
Limited evidence of fault tolerance, consistency, or real-time traffic integration in past work
